figures_detected.description: Flywheel runout measurement with dial indicator mounted on engine block
Piston and connecting rod assembly showing piston grade number, frontmark, cylinder number, and front of engine orientation
Piston pin installation tool setup using KV10116620, KV10116610, and ST13040000 on a press
Piston ring installation showing punch mark side up (if mark is present) with ring marked R

steps.text: Assemble piston, piston pin and connecting rod, after heating small end to 200°C (392°F).
notes: Align the direction of piston and connecting rod.
Numbers stamped on connecting rod and cap correspond to each cylinder.
After assembly, make sure connecting rod swings smoothly.
CAUTION: When piston rings are not replaced, make sure that piston rings are mounted in their original position.
CAUTION: When piston rings are being replaced and no punch mark is present, piston rings can be mounted with either side up.

content_blocks.text: Align the direction of piston and connecting rod.
Numbers stamped on connecting rod and cap correspond to each cylinder.
After assembly, make sure connecting rod swings smoothly.
When piston rings are not replaced, make sure that piston rings are mounted in their original position.
When piston rings are being replaced and no punch mark is present, piston rings can be mounted with either side up.

tools_referenced.name: Piston pin press tool (upper)
tools_referenced.usage: Used with KV10116610 and ST13040000 to press piston pin into connecting rod small end

tools_referenced.name: Piston pin press tool (lower guide)
tools_referenced.usage: Used with KV10116620 and ST13040000 to press piston pin into connecting rod small end

tools_referenced.name: Piston pin press base
tools_referenced.usage: Base fixture for piston pin installation press assembly
